knowledge_points.name: 学校场所词汇认读与拼写
knowledge_points.description: 掌握library, teachers' office, playground, art room, computer room, garden等校园场所名词

knowledge_points.name: 询问与描述场所方位
knowledge_points.description: 运用Where's the...? It's on the first/second floor.以及next to等表达位置

knowledge_points.name: 确认场所的一般疑问句
knowledge_points.description: 使用Is this the...?/Do you have a...?进行确认及肯定否定回答

knowledge_points.name: 字母组合er在词尾的发音规则
knowledge_points.description: 掌握er在water, tiger, sister, dinner等词尾发/ə/的规律

knowledge_points.name: 时间表达与询问
knowledge_points.description: 使用What time is it? It's ... o'clock. 询问并告知时间

knowledge_points.name: 日常活动词汇与短语
knowledge_points.description: 掌握get up, go to school, English class, breakfast等作息相关短语

knowledge_points.name: It's time for与It's time to句型区分
knowledge_points.description: 区分It's time for + 名词与It's time to + 动词短语的用法逻辑

knowledge_points.name: 天气形容词的认读
knowledge_points.description: 掌握hot, cold, warm, cool, rainy, sunny, windy, cloudy, snowy等词汇

knowledge_points.name: 询问天气状况
knowledge_points.description: 熟练运用What's the weather like in (Beijing)?进行城市天气询问

knowledge_points.name: 基于天气的活动建议
knowledge_points.description: 结合天气判断能否进行户外活动，如Can I go outside? No, you can't.

knowledge_points.name: 农场蔬菜与动物词汇(复数)
knowledge_points.description: 掌握tomatoes, potatoes, horses, cows等词汇及名词变复数的特殊形式如sheep

knowledge_points.name: these与those指代辨析
knowledge_points.description: 区分近指these与远指those在询问复数物品时的用法

knowledge_points.name: 询问物品数量
knowledge_points.description: 使用How many ... do you have?询问数量并回答

knowledge_points.name: 字母组合ar和al的发音规律
knowledge_points.description: 掌握ar, al在单词中通常发/ɑː/或/ɔː/的规律及其辨析

knowledge_points.name: 衣物类词汇与动词搭配
knowledge_points.description: 掌握skirt, dress, pants等词汇及put on, hang up等关联动词

knowledge_points.name: 询问物品归属(所有格)
knowledge_points.description: 使用Whose... is this/are these?及名词所有格Mike's等回答

knowledge_points.name: 名词性物主代词mine与yours
knowledge_points.description: 初步掌握mine, yours等代词在归属表达中的简单应用

knowledge_points.name: 询问商品价格
knowledge_points.description: 区分单复数使用How much is this...? / How much are those...?

knowledge_points.name: 描述与评价商品
knowledge_points.description: 运用pretty, expensive, cheap, too big, just right等形容词评价物品

knowledge_points.name: 字母组合le在词尾的发音
knowledge_points.description: 掌握apple, table, people等词尾le发/l/的规律
